  1. Home
  2. Custom Signs
  3. Polymetal Signs

Polymetal Signs

Custom Metal Signs

 
  • Product Overview

Material

Polymetal Sign Material

Polymetal is an exterior sign board that is 3 mm thick. Polymetal has a solid plastic core with no flutes. One benefit to using Polymetal is that it can be routed on the back and then bent to form a lip so that it can be installed with no fasteners on the face.

Polymetal Sign Finishing 

 The following options are available for finishing your metal signs:

  • Standard 3 mm thickness
  • Single or double sided signs
  • Square cut or contour cut (Custom Shape)
  • Printed with a full bleed (color goes all the way to the edge of the sign)

Artwork

Artwork Guidelines

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps files — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Production Times

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.
 

Shipping Maps

Polymental Signs

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )
Three Day ( 3 Business Days )
Two Day ( 2 Business Days )
Overnight ( 1 Business Day )
UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

International shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Product Options
Not seeing the size you want? Click here and get a custom quote.

      Add to Cart

      More About Polymetal Signs Return to Top

      Need something storable yet durable? If so, then check out these 3 mm polymetal signs from Banners.com. These signs will help your message shine with their ability to reflect the sun. Polymetal signs are a type of outdoor metal sign that is commonly used for exterior building signage to display business names and graphics or as a custom parking lot sign.

      These custom metal signs consist of a plastic core sandwiched between two sheets of finished aluminum, giving this sign flexibility along with durability making it an ideal outdoor metal sign option. Pair your polymetal signs with a personalized yard sign to step up your branding today!

      Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

      What are 3 mm polymetal signs used for?

      3 mm polymetal signs are durable outdoor signs commonly used for exterior building signage, parking lot signs, and directional messaging.

      What are 3 mm polymetal signs made of?

      Polymetal is a 3 mm sign board with a solid plastic core sandwiched between two finished aluminum sheets (no flutes).

      What sizes are available for 3 mm polymetal signs?

      Common sizes include 18" × 12" and 24" × 18", with additional options from 12" × 12" up to 30" × 48".

      Can I order custom-shaped 3 mm polymetal signs?

      Yes—contour-cut polymetal signs are available for custom shapes.

      Can 3 mm polymetal signs be printed double-sided?

      Yes—3 mm polymetal signs can be printed double-sided. Use protective sheets or cloth during storage to help prevent scratches.

      Are 3 mm polymetal signs printed in full color?

      Yes—polymetal signs are digitally printed in full CMYK color.

      Are 3 mm polymetal signs weather-resistant?

      Yes—3 mm polymetal signs are weather-resistant and waterproof for outdoor use.

      How should I store my 3 mm polymetal signs?

      Store signs in a dry, temperature-stable location to help prevent surface scuffs and handling damage.

      Can I request a proof before printing?

      Yes—request a PDF proof to review before production, and printing begins only after you approve it.

      What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

      Production options range from 1–5 business days, and turnaround starts after file upload is complete (or after approval if a proof is requested or prepress flags the order). Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST are processed the next business day, and delivery time includes production plus shipping.

       

      Why Choose Banners.com?

      Customer Service

      Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

      Fast Turnaround

      Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

       

      Quality Products

      Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

      Live Order Tracking

      Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

metaDescription: Order Custom 3mm Polymetal Signs Online in minutes! These custom outdoor metal signs are great for exterior building signage to display your business name and logo!
